displayTitle: Fire, Listen, Draw: The Pulse-Echo Loop

beats.narration: Strip away the branding: every ultrasonic flaw detector is the same machine. One loop, fire, listen, draw, hundreds to thousands of times a second.

payload.title: THE FLAW DETECTOR
payload.sub: The same machine under every brand's skin.

beats.narration: The clock fires the pulser and sweep at the same instant, so screen position is time. The transducer converts, the receiver amplifies, the display draws.
Three presentations. A-scan: amplitude versus time at one spot. B-scan: a cross-section along a line. C-scan: a plan view from above.

payload.heading: Three ways to draw the same echoes

beats.narration: Four everyday controls. Gain scales echo height: six decibels doubles it. Range sets the span. Delay slides zero. Reject? Treat with suspicion.

payload.heading: Four controls you'll touch every scan

beats.narration: So read the A-scan like a sentence. Across answers where: the distance to the reflector. Up answers how much energy came back.

payload.sub: Read the A-scan like a sentence.
